title: Teen Thinks He Can Get Away After Decapitating His Girlfriend

beats.description: Dramatic opening showing Brooks's arrest and bizarre, detached reaction to the crime scene.
Flashback to the 911 call, paramedics arriving, and initial police assessment of the gruesome scene.
Brooks is transported to the station; early interrogation reveals contradictory claims about the timeline and events.
Sponsor advertisement break interrupting the narrative flow.
Interrogation intensifies as Brooks denies the gun fired and insists Haley was alive, raising intoxication suspicions.
Interviews with Haley's friends expose a toxic, abusive relationship and Brooks's erratic behavior prior to the shooting.
Detectives reveal Haley's death, triggering Brooks's explosive breakdown, denial, and destruction of the interrogation camera.
Interrogation ends; detectives analyze his intoxication, possible motive, and the lack of a confession.
Trial outcome reveals forensic mishandling, resulting in lesser charges and an 11-year sentence.
